nasb.text: who will not receive many times as much at this time and in the age to come, eternal life.”

esv.text: who will not receive many times more in this time, and in the age to come eternal life.”

cnv.text: 沒有不在今世得許多倍，來世得永生的。”

ccb.text: 今世必得百倍的奖赏，来世必得永生。”

csbs.text: 而不会在今世得到许多倍，在来世得到永恒生命的。”
